Home.title: Numerology Application
Home.subtitle: Explore your number map through your birth date and name — decode life path, mission, and hidden potential.
Home.chatNotice: Experience Numerology coaching with our AI expert now!
Home.videoCaption: Watch the guide on how to read and understand your numerology indices

Numerology.namePlaceholder: Your full name, ex: 'Nguyen Van A'

Validation.futureDate: Birth date cannot be in the future
Validation.yearRange: Birth year must be between {min} and {max}

Disclaimer.title: 📌 Disclaimer
Disclaimer.content: This application is for reference and entertainment purposes only. It is not intended for fortune telling, superstition, or any purpose contrary to good morals and customs.

Chat.title: 🔮 Numerology AI Assistant
Chat.subtitle: Ask anything about numerology — powered by AI with knowledge base
Chat.errorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again.
Chat.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this chat session? This action cannot be undone.
Chat.confirmClearAllMsg: Are you sure you want to delete all chat history? This action cannot be undone.
Chat.privacyNotice: Your privacy matters! All chat data is securely stored only on your local device.
Chat.guideDesc1: Numerology AI Assistant analyses based on the info you provide. You can ask deeply about your numbers, personal years, birth chart, etc.
Chat.guideDesc2: Multi-session Management: You can create separate chats. The system automatically names them based on your first message.
Chat.guideDesc3: Security & Privacy: All your data is stored locally on this device. No one else has access to it.
Chat.guideDesc4: Backup & Restore: You can Export and Import your chat history at any time to switch devices.
Chat.emptyStateSubtitle: I have access to a comprehensive knowledge base with thousands of articles about Pythagoras numerology.
Chat.emptyStateExample: Example: 'Nguyen Van A born 11-06-1976' or 'What does life path number 7 mean?'
Chat.tip: 💡 Enter full name and birth date for personalized analysis
Chat.providerMultiKeyHint: Multiple keys will be rotated (round-robin) to avoid rate limits.
Chat.providerNoModels: No models found. Check your key/URL.

Admin.pageSubtitle: Auto-generate Embeddings (Gemini) and insert into MilvusDB
Admin.toastSuccessCheckDesc: System successfully connected to Zilliz Cloud.
Admin.toastErrorCheckDesc: Please check your Address and Token configuration in .env
Admin.bulkLabel: Upload JSON file containing data array
Admin.toastErrorInvalidJson: JSON file must be an array of objects!
